summary: The diff implements all three requirements: order history debugging (REQ-15), delivery schedule debugging (REQ-16), and delivery date display (REQ-17). Backend types and functions are fixed, React Query hooks are added with proper error handling, and both frontend pages display data with formatted dates.

hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly states 'Do not add new order statuses beyond placed/delivered/canceled' as a non-goal, and there is no requirement to implement order cancellation functionality. The cancelOrder function was added without being requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Added scheduleDelivery function with deliveryTime parameter
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-17 only requires storing and displaying delivery date. The addition of deliveryTime as a separate field and the scheduleDelivery function for manual scheduling was not requested. The non-goals explicitly state 'Implementing automated delivery date scheduling logic' should not be done.
No requirement requested the ability to update order status programmatically. This function was implemented without being specified in the BuildRequest.
